channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: As temperatures turn frigid, Minnesotans turn to saunas for warmth and community
item.description: As temperatures drop into the teens, Minnesotans have embraced sauna culture for warmth and community.
item.dc:creator: Michael Goldberg And Mark Vancleave, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The next Realme flagship phone could break the 8,000mAh battery barrier – more than 2x the iPhone 16 capacity
item.description: We could have a new bar set for big batteries in thin consumer phones if this latest leak is accurate.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is Bluesky, the 'up-and-coming' social platform seen as X alternative
item.description: Bluesky, a new social platform garnering millions of users, is now competing with top networks like X and Truth Social. Jack Dorsey, a former CEO at Twitter, created the site in 2019 to be “a protocol for public conversation.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Before Apple releases a television, it needs to fix its TV app, and more
item.description: Earlier this month, the tech sphere was buzzing following a report that Apple was “evaluating” the idea of releasing a television.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Artificial intelligence changes across the US
item.description: As more companies implement artificial intelligence for daily tasks, some industry leaders are working to push back against certain aspects of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Joshua trees are in peril. California has a plan to save them
item.description: The California Department of Fish and Wildlife has released a new plan to protect the state’s iconic Joshua trees, which are imperiled by wildfires, human development and climate change.
item.dc:creator: Dorany Pineda, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Muddy footprints suggest 2 species of early humans were neighbors in Kenya 1.5 million years ago
item.description: Muddy footprints left on a Kenyan lakeside suggest two of our early human ancestors were neighbors some 1.5 million years ago.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Uber branches out into AI data labeling
item.description: Uber no longer offers just rides and deliveries: It’s created a new division hiring out gig workers to help enterprises with some of their AI model development work.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cloud providers turn to custom chips to meet high demand
item.description: Squeezed between AI-driven demand for ever-faster computing, and shortages of the GPUs used to accelerate those workloads, hyperscalers are designing custom silicon for specific workloads to further improve performance while cutting costs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 prerequisites for IT leaders to navigate today’s era of disruption
item.description: For its Generative AI Readiness Report, IT services company Avanade surveyed over 3,000 business and IT executives in 10 countries from companies with at least $500 million in annual revenue.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Australian Senate debates social media ban for under-16s
item.description: The major parties' support for the ban all but guarantees the legislation will become law. But many child welfare and mental health advocates are concerned about unintended consequences.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Johnson to host Musk, Ramaswamy at Capitol ahead of DOGE work
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) will host Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, the co-leads of the newly established "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE), at the Capitol on Dec. 5, he announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: TikTok rolling out age restrictions on beauty filters amid mental health concerns
item.description: TikTok announced Tuesday it will restrict the use of some appearance effects for users under 18 after teens and parents in a new study expressed concerns about the impact of beauty filters.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Kotlin Concurrency Model Tutorial: Mastering Coroutines, Channels, and Flows
item.description: Learn how to use Kotlin's concurrency model with coroutines, channels, and flows for cooperative cancellation, data sharing, and reactive programming.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Equinix to cut 3% of staff amidst the greatest demand for data center infrastructure ever
item.description: Even as demand for data infrastructure surges to an all-time high, Equinix is planning to lay off 3% of its workforce, suggesting a growing skills mismatch in the industry.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: This TikTok user says a popular YouTube music channel is in fact AI
item.description: Are you really a student if you’ve not done a late night study session soundtracked to an unending lo-fi beats playlist on YouTube? According to Google Trends, searches for the term “lo-fi” on YouTube have tripled since 2020.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Pentagon drafts large-scale government AI contract
item.description: Potential bidders have a little under a month to offer feedback on the draft RFP for what DoD is calling the Advancing AI Multiple Award Contract. The post Pentagon drafts large-scale government AI contract first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Nvidia shows off a new genAI model that can create sound and music
item.description: Nvidia on Monday showed off a new generative AI (genAI) model that can be used to create all kinds of sounds and music: Fugatto (which stands for Foundational Generative Audio Transformer Opus 1).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Linux command line for beginners: 25 essential commands
item.description: Getting started on the Linux command line might seem overwhelming at first, but the many commands you need to use will fall into place more quickly than you might imagine. Let’s start with some introductory but very important commands.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KREX 5
